name: Moser Engineering
message: [AI generated] Moser Engineering is a renowned company recognized for manufacturing high-grade performance auto parts. Founded in 1986 in Portland, Indiana, it specializes in producing aftermarket axle and drivetrain components. Its product line includes axles, differential covers, rear ends, brake kits, and more. The company serves varied customers, including drag racing, muscle cars, street rods, hot rods, and vehicle restoration enthusiasts.
